question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not provide a list of the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only includes a problem statement and a development plan table, so the reader cannot identify the chapter structure.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of each section. The only content presented is the problem statement and a schedule table, which do not explain what each chapter will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: From this text it is not possible to understand the general structure of the thesis. The document lacks an outline or overview of how the work will be organized.
